creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text: Ok I have no idea how to move forward on this. My upstream bug report was closed stating the bug was fixed by changing this one occurence and a promise to look over the full source. The patch I attached does not solve the problem, but maybe "works around" it -- someone on an architecture where `char` is unsigned would have to confirm. As an alternative, I could add a patch with the upstream correction, but again, someone has to confirm that. I don't have a system with unsigned `char` at hand ...
